name: ROS 2 Humble Dev
postCreateCommand: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y python3-pip ros-humble-foxglove-bridge ros-humble-gazebo-ros-pkgs ros-humble-slam-toolbox && echo 'source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash && source /workspaces/Robot/install/setup.bash && export ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY=1' >> ~/.bashrc && source ~/.bashrc
